DARV.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: Here, take one of these forgotten gems with ya!
DARV.talk.ANY.1-0r.ancient:
I’ve got things to do today!
Take whatever ya want from that pile!!
DARV.talk.DEFECT.0-0.ancient: You’re a beautiful hunk of junk, you know that?
DARV.talk.DEFECT.1-0r.ancient: Still keeping at it, I see... Let’s see if we can upgrade ya!
DARV.talk.DEFECT.2-0.ancient:
I’ve been holding on to your friend’s uhh... um.
Nevermind nevermind!!
DARV.talk.DEFECT.2-2.ancient: My scrappy scrapper, forget I said all that!
DARV.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.ancient:
The flaming warrior has returned!
I’ve got just the thing for ya!
DARV.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.ancient: Good to see ya still kickin’ and bashin’ em heads in!
DARV.talk.IRONCLAD.2-0.ancient: I’m still holding on to that heavy blade of yours... but I can’t find no one to restore it.
DARV.talk.NECROBINDER.0-0.ancient: I can tell you’re a serious one. What can I do for ya missy?
DARV.talk.NECROBINDER.0-1.char: Anything to help me kill a most loathsome man.
DARV.talk.NECROBINDER.0-2.ancient: Very well then... have a gander!
DARV.talk.NECROBINDER.1-0r.ancient: Still on that warpath? I ain’t gonna stop ya!
DARV.talk.NECROBINDER.2-0.ancient: This book seems tied to ya, been around longer than you have.
DARV.talk.NECROBINDER.2-1.char: How did you come into possession of that?
DARV.talk.NECROBINDER.2-2.ancient: [sine]Scary[/sine] things have a way of ending up in my collection.
DARV.talk.REGENT.0-0.ancient: What brings the likes of you up here? Wanna take a look at my collection?
DARV.talk.REGENT.2-0.ancient: To my new friend, do I have somethin’ for ya!
DARV.talk.REGENT.2-2.ancient:
I’d give it but the Architect nabbed it from me!!
Help a buddy out! Do me a favor will ya?
DARV.talk.SILENT.0-0.ancient:
Back in the Spire for you too huh?
Can’t resist those shinies right?!
DARV.talk.SILENT.1-0r.ancient: I’ll trade ya somethin’ nice for that trophy you got there!
DARV.talk.SILENT.2-0.ancient:
Pity ya don’t remember all my generosity!
Yeah yeah, you know how Neow is...
DARV.talk.SILENT.2-2.ancient: Well! Let’s get you equipped for that final showdown or whatevah!
DARV.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.ancient:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!
DARV.title: Darv
ERROR.description: You found a bug! Please report it using the Feedback button in the Settings menu.
ERROR.title: Locked
NEOW.talk.REGENT.0-0.char: Oversized blue creature, I am the future [orange]King[/orange]!
NEOW.title: Neow
NONUPEIPE.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: Madness awaits at the top. Don my power and vanquish.
NONUPEIPE.talk.ANY.1-0r.ancient:
You’ve traveled so far to reach me!
Come closer, receive my blessing.
NONUPEIPE.talk.DEFECT.0-0.ancient:
Could a construct truly be worthy of my blessings?
Come forward, Defect. You will be the most beautiful of all automata.
NONUPEIPE.talk.DEFECT.1-0r.ancient: My poor, battered machine, let me refine you.
NONUPEIPE.talk.DEFECT.2-0.ancient: I usually don’t like the Architect’s things, but I admit you’re growing on me.
NONUPEIPE.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.ancient:
Ah, the Ironclad finally arrives before me.
Come forth and I shall endow you with my power.
NONUPEIPE.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.ancient: Ironclad ironclad... was my previous gift not enough?
NONUPEIPE.talk.IRONCLAD.2-0.ancient:
You return again my champion? How many times?
Were you not strong enough to wipe out entire clans before?
NONUPEIPE.talk.NECROBINDER.0-0.char: Your guards are dead, rumors say you can bestow blessings for those who wish the Architect dead.
NONUPEIPE.talk.NECROBINDER.0-1.ancient:
I appreciate someone capable and shall grant a measure of my power.
Next time, don’t kill my guards.
NONUPEIPE.talk.NECROBINDER.1-0r.ancient: A mage needs fine accouterments for battle. Come forth, Necrobinder.
NONUPEIPE.talk.NECROBINDER.2-0.ancient: The Architect won’t be pleased to see that [sine]pet[/sine] of yours.
NONUPEIPE.talk.NECROBINDER.2-1.char: Do you mean Osty? He will be the one to deliver the final blow.
NONUPEIPE.talk.REGENT.0-1.ancient:
Such beautiful robes you’ve brought from faraway lands!
Have your minions bring you closer and I will bless thee.
NONUPEIPE.talk.REGENT.1-0r.ancient:
Royal blessings for royal visitors.
Servants! Fetch some tea for us.
NONUPEIPE.talk.REGENT.2-0.ancient: The Architect has gone mad! If only a noble champion could save us from this plight...
NONUPEIPE.talk.REGENT.2-1.char:
Fear not! I, the Regent, will put an end to the madness!
But first, tea!
NONUPEIPE.talk.SILENT.0-0.ancient:
A little thief has snuck into my domain?
Don’t think I can’t see you? Come on out!
NONUPEIPE.talk.SILENT.0-1.char: [i][font_size=22]The Silent steps out of the shadows...[/font_size][/i]
NONUPEIPE.talk.SILENT.0-2.ancient:
A huntress, what beckons your return to the Spire?
Approach and don these blessings.
NONUPEIPE.talk.SILENT.1-0r.ancient: I have prepared gifts for you, assassin, don’t be shy.
NONUPEIPE.talk.SILENT.2-0.ancient: Of all of her puppets, you surprise me most.
NONUPEIPE.talk.SILENT.2-2.ancient:
What took your first life? Did Neow [sine]find[/sine] you?
A shame you don’t speak.
NONUPEIPE.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.ancien:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.
NONUPEIPE.title: Nonupeipe
OROBAS.pages.INITIAL.options.OPTION_POOL: You have no starter relics or cards.
OROBAS.talk.DEFECT.0-0.ancient:
What! Servant construct?! Still working!!
Why here? Why not at Factory??
OROBAS.talk.DEFECT.2-0.ancient:
Core broken? Neow use broken construct?
Manipulated?
OROBAS.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.ancient: An Ironclad!? How possible?? Scary. Very scary!!
OROBAS.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.ancient: Contract signer? Why!? Bad choice? Yes. Mistake!
OROBAS.talk.IRONCLAD.2-0.ancient:
Wishing you freedom!! Wishing hard!
Vakuu bad. Very bad! Architect free you?
OROBAS.talk.NECROBINDER.0-0.ancient: Dead?! Not dead! Why puppet? Big hand!!
OROBAS.talk.NECROBINDER.0-1.char:
I’m no puppet. There’s a man I must kill.
What can you do for me?
OROBAS.talk.NECROBINDER.1-0r.ancient: Not dead one! Good gifts for you!! Violence bad.
OROBAS.talk.NECROBINDER.2-0.ancient: No violence! Collect shiny instead... Shiny!!
OROBAS.talk.NECROBINDER.2-1.char:
My quest will only end when the Architect is no more.
Violence is inevitable.
OROBAS.talk.NECROBINDER.2-2.ancient: Architect not bad! Maybe talk? Talking good!! Very good!
OROBAS.talk.REGENT.0-0.ancient:
Traveller! From space!? Where in space?
How from space? Pointy head! Little friends!!
OROBAS.talk.REGENT.1-0r.ancient:
More stories! Found these for you!
Now tell more story!!
OROBAS.talk.REGENT.2-0.char:
My number one fan! Orobas, friend!
Lovely to see you’re still alive!
OROBAS.talk.REGENT.2-2.char: Of course of course... but have you found any trinkets for me?
OROBAS.talk.SILENT.1-0r.ancient: Not contagious? Very dying? Architect help you?
OROBAS.talk.SILENT.2-0.ancient:
Where sisters? Scary mean sisters!
Be good person! Don’t be like sisters!!
OROBAS.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.ancient: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!
OROBAS.title: Orobas
PAEL.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: [thinky_dots]Welcome back friend. Let my flesh help you...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.ANY.1-0r.ancient: [i][font_size=22]Pael is sleeping. His snoring shakes the room.[/font_size][/i]
PAEL.talk.DEFECT.0-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Troubled automaton, looking for your friend?
Let me help...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.DEFECT.1-0r.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Do constructs dream?
Watch and copy me...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.DEFECT.2-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]I dreamt of your friend...
Father can restore [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.ancient: [thinky_dots]You contain such rage. Take from me and find some peace...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Do you remember how it feels to dream?
It is good to sleep...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.IRONCLAD.2-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]You must quell your flames.
Father can free you...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.NECROBINDER.0-1.char: We would share the same paint if you knew what’s befallen me.
PAEL.talk.NECROBINDER.0-2.ancient:
[thinky_dots]There is no peace on your path.
Take a part of me to ease your burdens...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.NECROBINDER.1-0r.ancient:
[thinky_dots]The one with the Hand returns.
Painful memories. Take my strength and leave...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.REGENT.0-0.char:
Hello! I am the Regent.
Hellooo?? [jitter]HELLO!?[/jitter]
PAEL.talk.REGENT.0-1.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Quiet down now.
Take a part of me and be on your way...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.REGENT.1-0r.char:
I’m back! Ah, you’re asleep of course.
Let’s see here...
PAEL.talk.REGENT.2-0.char: Why do you give yourself away?
PAEL.talk.REGENT.2-1.ancient: [thinky_dots]Why not give when I have an abundance of flesh?[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.REGENT.2-2.ancient:
[thinky_dots]When you return, I will be replenished anew.
That’s what sleep does...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.SILENT.0-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Murderous creature, no need for violence here.
Have part of me and find peace...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.SILENT.1-0r.ancient:
[thinky_dots]Trophy hunting? Sure, take a part of me...
Whatever grants you comfort...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.SILENT.2-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]You’ve poisoned me...?
What is this going to...? zZZzz...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.ancient:
[thinky_dots]A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...[/thinky_dots]
PAEL.title: Pael
PROCEED.title: Proceed
TANX.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: GROW STRONGER SO WE CAN FIGHT!!!
TANX.talk.ANY.1-0r.ancient: YOU CAN NEVER HAVE TOO MANY WEAPONS!!
TANX.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.ancient: IMPRESSIVE SWORD, WARRIOR! YOU CAN USE MORE WEAPONS!
TANX.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.ancient: WEAPONS FOR THE WARRIOR! GRAB A WEAPON! LET’S FIGHT!
TANX.talk.NECROBINDER.0-2.ancient: DOES THE HAND NEED A WEAPON!?
TANX.talk.NECROBINDER.2-1.char: [i][font_size=22]The Necrobinder and Osty scuffle with Tanx.[/font_size][/i]
TANX.talk.REGENT.0-0.ancient: ORANGE!? HOW IS THIS BEING ORANGE!??
TANX.talk.REGENT.0-1.char: All know that orange is the most regal color!
TANX.talk.REGENT.1-0r.ancient: ORANGE ONE!! CHOOSE A MIGHTY WEAPON!
TANX.talk.REGENT.2-1.char: No! We fought last time I was here!
TANX.talk.SILENT.0-0.ancient: A HUNTRESS! I WILL SHARPEN YOUR CLAW!!
TANX.talk.SILENT.2-1.char: [i][font_size=22]The Silent escapes, stealing a weapon on the way.[/font_size][/i]
TANX.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.ancient:
SO WEAK! BUT YOU HAVE POTENTIAL!
USE THIS WEAPON!!
TANX.title: Tanx
TEZCATARA.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: Welcome back, sweetie. Let me [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] away your flaws.
TEZCATARA.talk.ANY.1-0r.ancient: Do come in, dear! What can Tezcatara do for you today?
TEZCATARA.talk.DEFECT.0-1.ancient: Not here to annoy me? What an [jitter][b]unusual[/b][/jitter] little construct...
TEZCATARA.talk.DEFECT.1-0r.ancient: Now how silly would it be if he were unmade by one of his own?
TEZCATARA.talk.DEFECT.2-0.ancient: Are you sure you want to be fixed up?
TEZCATARA.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.ancient: You [jitter][b]burn[/b][/jitter] so pretty! Come in, come in!
TEZCATARA.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.ancient:
Such a strong boy you are! Come and eat something.
Can’t [jitter][b]slaughter[/b][/jitter] on an empty stomach!
TEZCATARA.talk.IRONCLAD.2-0.ancient:
Ohh, Architect still alive? Kill him [jitter][b]quickly[/b][/jitter] would you?
I’ll be waiting right here!
TEZCATARA.talk.NECROBINDER.0-0.ancient: Now what’s a skeleton doing inside these walls?
TEZCATARA.talk.NECROBINDER.0-1.char:
My aim is simple. Vengeance for my family.
I’ll reach the top and make him pay.
TEZCATARA.talk.NECROBINDER.1-0r.ancient: Come in, come in! Let’s make your flames burn [jitter][b]brighter[/b][/jitter].
TEZCATARA.talk.NECROBINDER.2-0.ancient: Those flames around you remind me of something forbidden.
TEZCATARA.talk.REGENT.0-0.ancient: Oh my, what an [jitter][b]exotic[/b][/jitter] visitor! Who might you be, sweetie?
TEZCATARA.talk.REGENT.0-1.char: I’m no sweetie! Address me with respect, giant... thing-person!
TEZCATARA.talk.REGENT.0-2.ancient:
Where are my manners?
[i][font_size=22]Tezcatara cackles with delight.[/font_size][/i]
TEZCATARA.talk.REGENT.1-0r.ancient:
You and your friends are back again?
I’ve made [jitter][b]treats[/b][/jitter] for you!
TEZCATARA.talk.REGENT.2-0.ancient: Welcome back regal boy! Looks like you’re doing [jitter][b]great[/b][/jitter] out there.
TEZCATARA.talk.REGENT.2-1.char: Yes of course! Just some minor setbacks at the upper levels... like dying.
TEZCATARA.talk.REGENT.2-2.ancient: We all need to learn from our mistakes.
TEZCATARA.talk.SILENT.0-0.ancient: Come closer, quiet one. I can’t see well...
TEZCATARA.talk.SILENT.1-0r.ancient: Such a nasty [jitter][b]sickness[/b][/jitter] you have. Let’s take care of you.
TEZCATARA.talk.SILENT.2-0.ancient: I’ve met your sisters, you know? Such lovely girls they are.
TEZCATARA.talk.SILENT.2-2.ancient: Oh dear... you haven’t been [jitter][b]fighting[/b][/jitter] have you?
TEZCATARA.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.ancien:
Oh, a visitor! Do come in, dear!
What can Tezcatara do for you?
TEZCATARA.title: Tezcatara
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.DEFECT.1-0r.ancient: You’re back? Didn’t I dismantle you?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.DEFECT.1-2r.ancient: Fix you? Fix your friend? Ridiculous.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.DEFECT.2-0r.ancient: How do you keep coming back? Is this Neow’s doing?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0r.ancient: So the arch demon’s thrall has arrived?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.ancient: Cursed to fight forever, aren’t you?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.IRONCLAD.1-2r.ancient: Do you even know your name?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NECROBINDER.0-0.char: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my LIFE! ...and now I will kill YOU!
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NECROBINDER.0-1.ancie: Vengeance is it? No thank you.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NECROBINDER.1-0r.char: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my-
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NECROBINDER.1-1r.anci: You cannot change the past with anger.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NECROBINDER.2-0r.char: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my LIFE-
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NECROBINDER.2-1r.anci: I did what I must to maintain order.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.NECROBINDER.3-0r.char: ARCHITECT! You killed my parents. You killed my friend. You killed my-
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.REGENT.0-0.char: I’ve arrived! You there, commoner! Is this the top?
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.REGENT.1-2r.char: I’m neither loud nor a fool! Face me!
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.REGENT.2-0r.char: I’ve had enough of your poor manners!
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.REGENT.2-1r.ancient: Something we can both agree on.
THE_ARCHITECT.talk.SILENT.1-0r.ancient:
Where did you come from?
What are you after?
THE_ARCHITECT.title: The Architect
VAKUU.talk.ANY.0-0r.ancient: Seeking glory in the Spire are we? I have some propositions for you...
VAKUU.talk.DEFECT.1-0r.ancient: Do you find it strange that your fellow constructs want you dead?
VAKUU.talk.DEFECT.2-0.ancient: If you bring me the Architect’s heart, I will restore your [aqua]companion[/aqua].
VAKUU.talk.DEFECT.2-2.ancient: What’s more important? Your creator or your friend?
VAKUU.talk.IRONCLAD.0-0.ancient: Imagine seeing [sine]you[/sine] again after so long.
VAKUU.talk.IRONCLAD.0-1.char:
[jitter][b]SACRED DEMON![/b][/jitter]
What have you done to me!?
VAKUU.talk.IRONCLAD.1-0r.ancient:
Do the lost tribes weigh on you...?
[i][font_size=22]Vakuu howls with laughter.[/font_size][/i]
VAKUU.talk.IRONCLAD.2-0.ancient: My puppet of puppets... why haven’t you killed the Architect yet?
VAKUU.talk.IRONCLAD.2-1.char: After I kill the Architect, I will kill [jitter][b]YOU![/b][/jitter]
VAKUU.talk.IRONCLAD.2-2.ancient:
[i][font_size=22][sine]Yawn[/sine][/font_size][/i]
I look forward to watching you fail.
VAKUU.talk.NECROBINDER.0-0.ancient: We both seek [sine]vengeance[/sine]. It will have a cost to pay.
VAKUU.talk.NECROBINDER.0-1.char: I accept any cost. Every cost for his death.
VAKUU.talk.NECROBINDER.1-0r.ancient: I know where you got that [sine]Hand[/sine].
VAKUU.talk.NECROBINDER.2-0.ancient: The Architect has gravely wounded us both.
VAKUU.talk.NECROBINDER.2-1.char: Get on with it, demon. Show me your contracts.
VAKUU.talk.REGENT.0-0.ancient: A being from the stars? Within these accursed walls?
VAKUU.talk.REGENT.0-2.ancient: Yes, I think we can help each other.
VAKUU.talk.REGENT.1-0r.ancient: More of my power can be yours for a small price.
VAKUU.talk.REGENT.2-0.char: I don’t think these deals are good. I’m not feeling great.
VAKUU.talk.REGENT.2-1.ancient:
You read the contracts thoroughly have you not?
You have signed them with full intent and responsibility no?
VAKUU.talk.REGENT.2-2.ancient:
Are you not going to fulfill your end of the bargain?
How about another contract? Isn’t that better?
VAKUU.talk.SILENT.1-0r.ancient: [i][font_size=22]Vakuu displays his various contracts to the Silent[/font_size][/i]
VAKUU.talk.SILENT.2-0.ancient: The Architect is not enough, kill your sisters too!
VAKUU.talk.SILENT.2-2.ancient: No need for words, we are the same.
VAKUU.talk.firstVisitEver.0-0.ancient: Give yourself to me and you will be feared as much as I.
VAKUU.title: Vakuu
